title: neotinea tridentata var. commutata
intro: Neotinea tridentata var. commutata, also known as the Comosum orchid, is a rare and lesser-known species of orchid, characterized by its unique three-lobed lip and fragrant flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neotinea tridentata var. commutata include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
